query:
INSERT INTO intakeResponses (organizationId, questionId, section, response, updatedBy, updatedAt) VALUES 
(990001, 'IW.orders_description', 'Integration Workflows', 'Orders originate in Altera Paragon and route as HL7 ORM via Corepoint → DataFirst/Silverback → New Lantern. New / cancel / reschedule order types unblocked and in testing (wk of 6/2); STAT/stroke prioritization being validated with dedicated ER/inpatient test orders. ORC-1=NW with missing ORC-5 is treated as a scheduled order for prefetch (transform implemented). Open: Paragon ORM filing errors from invalid patient account/visit numbers, being corrected upstream by RMC IT. Test routing PV1.11 _RMCA_TEST (port 7080) / prod RMCA (7081).', 'notion-sync@system', NOW()),
(990001, 'IW.reports_description', 'Integration Workflows', 'Signed reports flow from New Lantern as HL7 ORU back through Silverback → Corepoint → Paragon for filing. Sign time carried in OBR-22 (per 6/5 feedback). Report sends tested with/without RMCA accession prefix; Dr. Stone physician-ID prefix ''P'' removed per request. Open: Paragon-side ORU filing errors under diagnosis with Paragon. Radiation dose (Radimetrics → Paragon → NL) integration planned for ALARA compliance (eff. 1/2027).', 'notion-sync@system', NOW()),
(990001, 'IW.priors_description', 'Integration Workflows', 'Priors retrieved on-demand from RMC PACS via Silverback DICOM Q/R (no bulk preload). Prior-report retention reduced 7 → 3 years (6/4 decision). Prefetch driven off scheduled-order logic. Evaluating extraction of historical reports from the PowerScribe DB (flat-file export) to support AI dictation training and prior-exam matching — NL to provide the flat-file spec.', 'notion-sync@system', NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE response = VALUES(response), updatedBy = VALUES(updatedBy), updatedAt = VALUES(updatedAt)
